locator.quote: spend 20h trying multiple small probes (5 agents × 1

text: Probe-shaped budget: spend ~20h on small probes (5 agents × 1 gen × 3 train + 3 eval days, ~1h each) and only commit a full cohort once a lever clearly bites.

locator.quote: (a) shaped rewards — no authority at probe, (b) BC supervised — strong,

text: Three-way classification of intervention authority at probe scale: (a) shaped rewards — no authority at probe, (b) BC supervised — strong, (c) env-side action masks — strong.

locator.quote: the common floor across all probes

text: Bite criteria are lever-specific; the common floor across all probes is locked ≥ +£70/d and naked_span ≤ baseline + 50.
